description_long: This is a male police officer dressed in a dark tactical uniform, including a black bulletproof vest labeled 'POLICE' on both the front and back. He wears fitted dark blue pants with reinforced knee pads and a utility belt equipped with pouches and gear. The officer is depicted in a dynamic, running pose, with one arm bent and a gloved hand raised to his head, as if communicating via a radio. He is wearing a modern virtual reality headset, which covers his eyes and part of his forehead, and has short, closely cropped hair. The uniform is practical and designed for urban operations, with visible protective and communication equipment.
description: A male police officer in a dark tactical uniform and bulletproof vest, running with a VR headset and utility belt gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'POLICE' label on the vest, VR headset, and raised gloved hand near the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the officer's profile, headset, and bent arm gesture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'POLICE' label on the back of the vest, utility belt, and running posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's arm extended backward and the VR headset profile.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical police uniform with long-sleeve dark shirt, dark blue reinforced pants, black bulletproof vest labeled 'POLICE', utility belt, and protective gloves.
attribute_headgear_style: Modern virtual reality headset, rectangular shape, black and white color, covering eyes and forehead.
